anti_claims: This skill JSON seed does not flip source authority away from the current skill markdown projection.
Resolved operated-standard and acted-on-kind edges are structural route mappings, not proof the skill is complete or used correctly by agents.
Absent mechanism or concept neighbours are residual pressure, not evidence that no such neighbours exist.
Generated graph, health, and atlas projections cannot be read back as source evidence.

omitted: mechanism or concept neighbours not named by typed source mapping
omission_receipt.reason: Skill instance preserves public-safe markdown source identity, digest, and typed route mapping only. JSON parity does not prove full skill-body completeness or runtime correctness.

residual_pressure.reentry_condition: Bind skill.uses mechanism and skill.applies concept edges only when source evidence names ids.

justification.summary: This markdown maps standard meta-contract propagation to std_microcosm_standard, the standard doctrine kind, and standards-meta diagnostics because changes to the recursive standard must be validated across the generated standard corpus before they govern downstream artifacts.

This markdown maps standard meta-contract propagation to std_microcosm_standard, the standard doctrine kind, and standards-meta diagnostics because changes to the recursive standard must be validated across the generated standard corpus before they govern downstream artifacts.
Skill source mapping names this concept as an applied doctrine boundary.
Skill source mapping names this mechanism as an operational dependency.

skill_payload.mapping_basis: This markdown maps standard meta-contract propagation to std_microcosm_standard, the standard doctrine kind, and standards-meta diagnostics because changes to the recursive standard must be validated across the generated standard corpus before they govern downstream artifacts.

statement: Microcosm Standard Refine Standard And Propagate
title: Microcosm Standard Refine Standard And Propagate
triggers: A reusable invariant belongs in std_microcosm_standard rather than one standard row.
Changing the standard meta-contract alters required fields, edge contracts, validator expectations, omission receipts, source-coupling rules, or authority ceilings across the standard corpus.
workflow: Prove the invariant from live standard JSON rows, standards registry, relation registry, validators, generated health, and receipt evidence before editing the meta-standard.
Update builder and validator logic so governs-kind edges, triad-skill pressure, contract residuals, anti-claims, and claim ceilings are computed rather than asserted.
Regenerate the lattice and keep unsupported validator completeness, source-body equivalence, release, or downstream-propagation claims as residual pressure until source evidence resolves them.
